title: pseudocalymma laevigatum
intro: Pseudocalymma laevigatum, also known as the African boxwood, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pseudocalymma laevigatum include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pseudocalymma laevigatum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional African medicine.
